# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repository:
    s3:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: my-elasticsearch-snapshots
        region: us-west-2
        access_key: ${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}
        secret_key: ${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}
        chunk_size: 100mb
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
    fs:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: /mnt/elasticsearch/snapshots
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
  schedule:
    daily:
      cron: "0 0 * * *"
      retention:
        age: 7d
        count: 5
    weekly:
      cron: "0 0 * * 0"
      retention:
        age: 30d
        count: 4
  settings:
    snapshot:
      wait_for_completion: true
      max_wait_time: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_completion: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_restore: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_snapshot: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_delete: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_restore_completion: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_snapshot_completion: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_delete_completion: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_restore_start: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_snapshot_start: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_delete_start: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_restore_end: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_snapshot_end: 30m
      max_wait_time_for_delete_end: 30m
